calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La appeared by zoom for Mark Walther (trustee).

Ms. La stated that she believes it would be okay to take the petition off calendar, that they are working with a notare in France to assist with getting this resolved and that they are waiting for confirmation that the matter was resolved. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Personal Property is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
